ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the movie production */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Profit calculated as revenue minus budget */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie was produced */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken in the movie */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_id" TEXT /* Rotten Tomatoes ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Drama) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the studio headquarters */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_studios" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the studio */,
  "production_role" TEXT /* Role of the studio in the movie production (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "franchise_description" TEXT /* Description of the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_franchises" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the franchise */,
  "franchise_position" INTEGER /* Position of the movie within the franchise (e.g., 1 for the first movie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for box office records */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "weekend" TEXT /* Date for the weekend box office record */,
  "gross_revenue" INTEGER /* Gross revenue earned during the weekend */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold during the weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_value" REAL /* Value of the vote (e.g., rating from 1 to 10) */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., rating, review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analytics records */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being analyzed */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received */,
  "release_month" INTEGER /* Month of the movie release */,
  "audience_score" REAL /* Average audience score */,
  "critic_score" REAL /* Average critic score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie associated with the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., inflation adjustment) */,
  "adjusted_value" INTEGER /* Adjusted revenue value */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_adjustments_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_reports, edit_movies) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_movie_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being tagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_tags_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production team */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being produced */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "team_member_role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., producer, screenwriter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_teams_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
